surfaces.surface_label: Detachment 201 Executive Innovation Corps commissioning surface, 2025
surfaces.notes: Non-hop chain connector. Senior technology-company executives commissioned as US Army Reserve officers. Sits at the procurement-corridor stage of the policy-to-deployment chain. It does NOT create a Clifford hop: there is no bounded surface with shared Clifford participation, only policy lineage and procurement corridor.

Bounded, sourced membership of Peter Thiel's invite-only Dialog society. Co-membership here is a real bounded surface, NOT a broad-institution or public-ecosystem listing. Hop basis is explicitly "co-member of Dialog (WIRED leak)"; a reviewer can weigh that on its face. Membership is a public-record fact and is not an assertion of attendance at any specific event, agreement, or wrongdoing.
